purpose: Machine-readable completion audit for the OPL DomainProgressTransitionRuntime and MAS PaperProgressPolicyAdapter target chain.
machine_boundary: This audit records completion evidence and open tails only. It does not create OPL commands, events, outbox items, StageRun identity, provider attempts, MAS owner receipts, typed blockers, human gates, route-back evidence, paper deltas, publication verdicts, artifact mutations, current package freshness, production readiness, or live paper progress.

overall.current_summary: Completion evidence is now split into repo-source retirement and live-runtime readiness. Repo-source physical retirement is not blocked by missing live OPL readback, domain diagnostic apply, provider running proof, or DM002/DM003 paper-line outcome. A repo-source retirement item can be marked done when active callsites have migrated to OPL primitives or MAS minimal PaperProgressPolicyAdapter / authority adapter, old modules/aliases/wrappers/compat shims/private scheduler-log-outbox-projection authority are physically deleted or tombstoned, missing live proof fails closed as a typed blocker, focused/meta/default verification passes, and docs/contracts/runtime inventory are updated. Live-runtime readiness remains a separate final acceptance tail: OPL command/event/outbox/StageRun readback, domain diagnostic apply exactly-one, provider admission/running proof, and fresh DM002/DM003 owner/paper-line outcomes are still required before runtime or paper progress can be claimed. OPL runtime slice, MAS policy adapter consumption, replay expansion, projection demotion, live-readback-only admission boundary, live readback transaction-consistency fail-closed validation, terminal closeout currentness, provider-hosted stale admission recovery, terminal handoff fixed-point projection rebuild, consumed terminal-blocker precedence over owner-receipt handoff surfaces, read-model rebuild proof-gating, and MAS runtime-health local event append retirement have landed. The MAS-facing OPL DomainProgressTransitionRuntime ABI is now single-sourced in contracts/opl_domain_progress_transition_runtime_contract.json and src/med_autoscience/controllers/opl_domain_progress_transition_contract.py, and request projection, MAS policy adapter, provider-admission boundary, and live-readback validator consume that shape. The OPL live-readback transaction-consistency ABI is also single-sourced in the same contract/helper and the MAS readback validator consumes the helper-defined identity, causality, latest-transaction refs, required command/event/outbox flags, and required read-model rebuild sections. The MAS validator now rejects read_model_readback when identity, causality, authority_boundary, exactly_one_outcome, or projection_metadata differ from the top-level live readback. The full equivalence target is still open because live domain diagnostic apply exactly-one outcome, OPL outbox/StageRun live readback, live DM002/DM003 provider-admission/running proof, and DM002/DM003 fresh paper-line outcome are not closed. paper_recovery_state now treats request-only current_work_unit/provider-admission projections as diagnostic until a complete OPL live readback is present; terminal typed-blocker handoff consumption rebuilds paper_recovery_state and current_executable_owner_action so stale successor actions cannot survive the same refresh; current_execution_surfaces now consume same-identity terminal typed blockers even when the handoff current_work_unit still projects owner_receipt_recorded; OPL current-control terminal closeout consumption no longer lets identity-bound admissions fall back to weak action/work-unit/fingerprint matching; MAS OPL transition readback consumer rejects thin StageRun identity, stale event/outbox/transaction refs, stale read-model rebuild sections, and provider-admission live readbacks whose study/work-unit/fingerprint/route/attempt/request identity does not match the current transition; and MAS provider-admission arbiter pending decisions now expose a non-authoritative opl_transition_event_consumption proof derived from the same provider-bound live readback instead of retaining empty-evidence pending decisions. Legacy owner-callable latest wire fallback is now explicit-history-only: current provider admission, current provider handoff export, and current clean-migration recovery readers require canonical owner_callable_adapter_receipts/latest.json and do not consume owner_callable_adapter_receipt/latest.json. Request-task alias retirement now removes the top-level materializer request_tasks field entirely; legacy request task refs survive only under legacy_request_task_diagnostics.legacy_request_task_refs as body-free diagnostic refs. Recovery successor consumption is now fingerprint-bound, so stale repair_progress_projection cannot consume a newer paper_recovery_state successor during fixed-point projection refresh. Domain-owner dispatch latest payload reads are now canonical-only by default; legacy owner_callable_adapter_receipt/latest.json can only be merged with explicit history/provenance opt-in and remains non-authority. Legacy owner-callable StageRun closeout packets are now machine-proven as OPL StageRun ABI/provenance and identity-recovery evidence only, not latest-wire fallback, provider-admission authority, execution authority, attempt lifecycle authority, or running/progress proof. Runtime lifecycle payload retention and runtime storage maintenance are now OPL-authorized maintenance callable adapters with fail-closed apply gates and repo-wide no-authority audit coverage; those repo-side guards do not claim OPL live takeover, physical delete, runtime readiness, or paper progress. OPL family adoption and product-entry persistence projections now consume the OPL StateIndex source-adapter manifest instead of inspecting domain_authority_refs.sqlite; legacy SQLite payload reads are explicit history replay/local inspection only and cannot satisfy StateIndex takeover. Completion evidence aggregation now rejects no-active caller scans as substitutes for OPL live-readback tail proof across owner-callable carrier, domain diagnostic obligation actuator, runtime-health observability, materializer projection, Workbench shell, lifecycle maintenance, and storage maintenance tails. Repo-source private-surface retirement is complete in the runtime_surface_retirement inventory at MAS 8de3658e with violation_count=0; live-runtime readiness remains evidence_required and cannot be claimed from source retirement. Fresh read-only DM002/DM003 readback at MAS b958148f87 / OPL b2f707de08 on 2026-06-19T09:07-09:08Z still shows no active_run, no active_stage_attempt, no provider admission, no transition request, no current executable owner action, domain diagnostic observe_only candidate_count=0, and both studies stopped with OPL supervisor-decision-backed stable typed blockers, so live paper acceptance remains open.

feature_audit.target: Provider admission accepts only OPL transition outbox or StageRun identity, not MAS projection residue.
evidence: OPL current-control and provider-hosted tests cover transition runtime payload, stale admission recovery, and single-flight guards.
MAS arbiter tests require OPL live readback for provider_admission_pending.
Paper recovery state now requires complete OPL live readback before current provider-admission projections can suppress stale parked/operator projections.
OPL current-control handoff projection preserves runtime-backed provider admission when a stale terminal closeout lacks bound identity, even if action/work-unit/fingerprint match.
MAS OPL transition readback contract tests reject StageRun identity without stage_run_id/stage_run_identity_ref and reject mismatched latest transaction, causality, and projection refs.
MAS OPL transition readback contract tests reject read_model_readback when rebuilt identity refs differ from the top-level live identity readback.

Provider admission now consumes provider_admission_opl_transition_readback, which requires complete OPL live readback plus matching study_id, work_unit_id, work_unit_fingerprint, route_identity_key, attempt_idempotency_key, and request idempotency key.

Paper recovery provider-admission state now consumes transition_request_pending only when the same candidate/current_work_unit lacks same-identity OPL live readback; once complete same-identity readback is present it is provider_admission_pending only, while stale/cross-identity readback and bare event/outbox/StageRun fragments remain request pending.

Paper autonomy supervisor gate now accepts materialize_recovery_action provider admission only when a provider-admission identity-bound OPL live readback matches the current paper autonomy obligation; request-only carriers cannot bypass via admission_pending or provider_admission_requires_opl_runtime_result=false recovery state.

Provider-admission arbiter pending decisions now expose opl_transition_event_consumption proof with event_id, outbox_item_id, transaction_id, stage_run identity, route identity, attempt idempotency, request idempotency, same-transaction flag, and MAS non-authority flags; request-only event/outbox/StageRun fragments remain transition_request_pending.

Provider-admission running-proof consumption now requires provider_admission_opl_transition_readback for the current action identity; a handoff running_provider_attempt flag without same-identity OPL live readback remains observability only, while a matching provider_admission_candidate may supply the readback without authorizing MAS to start the provider.
